author: codex
scope: Codex-only relation endpoint-shape rule-or-data triage artifact; deterministic local inspection only; no provider-backed commands, post-ingest LLM harnesses, materialize/export-jsonl/full validate/DB publish, durable data edits, code edits, LOG edits, manifest edits, submissions edits, retired.json edits, or canonical/generated edits

recent_work_not_repeated: next20 validator patch for operates_on_corridor entity->corridor
next21 data cleanup applied as relation046 for has_treatment claim->treatment_component
next22 data cleanup applied as relation048 for operated_by entity->event
relation047 data cleanup for has_treatment event->treatment_component
current_checkpoint_context.inspection_method: Read-only reconstruction from data/canonical/*.jsonl plus data/submission-overrides/retired.json, using the current RELATION_ENDPOINT_SHAPES in packages/pipeline/src/records/relations.ts. No validate/materialize/export/publish/provider command was run.

remaining_bucket_counts.triage_note: All remaining exact endpoint-shape buckets are singletons. The selected implemented_by entity->entity row is the clearest deterministic data cleanup because the same source text and endpoint records support organization hierarchy, and the current validator already admits part_of_agency entity->entity.

recommended_data_cleanup.why_data_cleanup: The current row uses implemented_by with an entity subject, but implemented_by is intentionally scoped to project -> entity. The source names a Maintenance of Way Division heading and then places Track, Structures, Stations and Facilities under Metro-North Railroad. That supports an organization-hierarchy relation, not a project implementation relation.
recommended_data_cleanup.why_not_validator_rule_patch: Allowing implemented_by entity->entity would blur implementing-agency semantics with agency/division hierarchy. The validator already has the precise shape needed here: part_of_agency entity->entity. Keep implemented_by entity->entity, source->entity, event->entity, treatment_component->entity, and corridor->entity invalid unless a future scoped ontology decision introduces a different relation kind or project endpoint.

candidate_submissions_to_retire.retire_reason: Malformed relation kind: Maintenance of Way Division is an entity/division within Metro-North Railroad context, not a project implemented_by Metro-North relation.

proposed_semantic_replacement_direction.recommended_label: Maintenance of Way Division part of Metro-North Railroad
proposed_semantic_replacement_direction.raw_text_to_reuse: 2022 3rd Quarter Maintenance of Way Division; Track, Structures, Stations and Facilities Metro-North Railroad

recommended_data_cleanup.replacement_collision_check: Read-only relation lookup found no existing part_of_agency relation between entity_98266-maintenance-of-way-division and entity_metro-north-railroad. Existing nearby relations involving Metro-North in meeting_doc_98266 are applies_to/other relations plus this malformed implemented_by row.

payload_summary.description: Maintenance of Way Division implements track programs for Metro-North Railroad

representative_records.triage_read: The heading and subheading identify an MNR division/reporting context. Retiring the implemented_by edge and adding part_of_agency preserves the entity-to-entity relationship without expanding implemented_by.

evidence_blocks.summary: Document heading states 2022 3rd Quarter Maintenance of Way Division.
evidence_blocks.short_source_quote: 2022 3 rd Quarter Maintenance of Way Division

evidence_blocks.summary: Subheading names Track, Structures, Stations and Facilities Metro-North Railroad.
evidence_blocks.short_source_quote: Track, Structures, Stations and Facilities Metro-North Railroad

why_safe: The original relation's endpoints are already accepted canonical records in the same source context.

The source-backed entity payload for Maintenance of Way Division already records organization: Metro-North Railroad, and accepted submission warnings for both relevant entity records suggested part_of_agency relation context.
The proposed replacement uses an already valid endpoint shape, part_of_agency entity->entity.
No validator rule expansion is required, and implemented_by remains scoped to project subjects with entity objects.
The cleanup affects one singleton bucket and does not overlap next20, next21, next22, relation047, relation048, or relation037-relation046 selected buckets.

non_goals: Do not edit packages/pipeline/src/records/relations.ts or tests for next23.
Do not edit data/submission-overrides/retired.json in this prep lane.
Do not append replacement submissions in this prep lane.
Do not edit data/canonical/*.jsonl, data/canonical.db, data/materialized/*, wiki/*, LOG.md, manifests, campaign files, or generated-output files.
Do not run canonicalize, campaign dedup, identity-review, write, ask, schema, ontology-normalize, any provider/profile-backed command, materialize, export-jsonl, full validate, or DB publish.
follow_up_worker_expected_actions: Retire sub_1d0e25e441bdce13 with a reason referencing this next23 prep artifact.

Append one accepted replacement relation submission with relation_kind part_of_agency, subject_local_observation_id entity_98266_maintenance_of_way_division, object_local_observation_id entity_98266_metro_north_railroad, and evidence meeting_doc_98266#p001_c0002 plus meeting_doc_98266#p001_c0003.

commands_run_read_only: pwd && rg --files data/review_notes data/canonical data/submissions | sed -n '1,200p'
node read-only endpoint-shape inventory over canonical JSONL plus retired.json exclusions using current relation endpoint shapes
node read-only relation lookup for endpoints entity_98266-maintenance-of-way-division and entity_metro-north-railroad
